questionHtml:
An object is thrown upwards. The graph shows the variation with time t of the velocity v of the object.

What is the total displacement at a time of 1.5 s, measured from the point of release?

A. 0 m

B. 1.25 m

C. 2.50 m

D. 3.75 m
